creator: rezaee.hadi@gmail.com
text:
Dears,

Currently, I'm experiencing an issue related to www/chromium port. the chromium (chromium-44.0.2403.125) literally doesn't work.

uname -a:
FreeBSD pc1 10.1-RELEASE-p16 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p16 #0: Tue Jul 28 12:04:19 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

I'd be appreciated if project maintainers could solve the issue asap.

Thank you,
